name: claude-review-for-codex
description: Experimental read-only Claude Code reviews for Codex, with Codex remaining the only writer and fixer.

interface.shortDescription: Experimental read-only Claude reviews for Codex edits.
interface.longDescription: Claude Review for Codex is an experimental v0.1 plugin that gives Codex a cost-aware second-opinion reviewer. Claude reads bounded review context and returns a human-readable Markdown review; Codex validates findings, records decisions, applies any fixes itself, and can ask Claude to verify the final diff.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude to review my diff, then have Codex fix valid findings.
Run an adversarial Claude review of this change.
Verify whether the accepted Claude findings are fixed.
